labels.label: FORMAL
labels.reason: Danger is defined as gcd(A,B,C)=1 and exact equality.

labels.label: FINITE_GOLD
labels.reason: Danger stayed 0 and closest miss stayed 1 through base 12500 / exp 8.

labels.label: KNOWN_THEOREM
labels.reason: Exact danger becomes a^3+b^3=c^3, blocked by Fermat exponent 3.

labels.label: FORMAL_REDUCTION + KNOWN_THEOREM
labels.reason: a^6=(a^2)^3 reduces sixth bridge to the cube wall.

labels.label: CONTAINED
labels.reason: C^4-B^4 factors as (C-B)(C+B)(C^2+B^2), but full closure is still open.

labels.label: ISOLATED
labels.reason: Local audit found no growing family, but no all-range rule exists.

labels.label: FINITE_GOLD
labels.reason: Nine mod-7 families support miss-1 and admit no miss-0 closure in the tested ledger.

labels.label: FINITE_GOLD
labels.reason: The obstruction persisted through mod 49, mod 343, and tested mod 2401.

labels.label: OPEN / NEXT_GATE
labels.reason: Finite lifting behavior has not yet been promoted to an all-range proof.
